DINOForge

Appearance

DINOForgeMod Platform for Diplomacy is Not an Option

A general-purpose mod operating system — not a single mod. Declarative packs, typed schemas, ECS-native integration.

Get Started
View on GitHub
🔧

Mod Platform

Not a single mod — a full operating system for DINO modding. Runtime bootstrap, SDK, registries, pack system, and CLI tooling.

📦

Pack System

YAML-first declarative mod packs with explicit dependencies, version ranges, conflict detection, and atomic install/uninstall.

⚔️

Warfare Domain

First domain plugin with factions, doctrines, unit taxonomies, weapon systems, wave composition, and themed content packs.

✅

Schema Validation

Catch errors before runtime. JSON/YAML schemas validate packs, dependency graphs, asset references, and ECS registration conflicts.

🧩

ECS Bridge

Maps cleanly to DINO's full Unity ECS (DOTS) architecture. ECS-native modding over Harmony patches for performance.

🎨

Asset Pipeline

AssetsTools.NET integration for icons, VFX, audio, and model overrides. Provenance tracking and credits manifests built in.

Released under the MIT License.
